name: Paragon

recommended.why: Paragon deals most of her damage through skills. Knight increases Skill Amplification, making it the most reliable and consistent choice for the majority of players.

alternative.why: Titan offers higher raw damage once Paragon has significant investment, especially after upgrading her Unique Weapon. It is a strong choice for experienced players focused on maximizing damage.

investment.why: Paragon remains one of the strongest frontline damage dealers throughout the game and continues to scale well with investment.

description: A frontline warrior capable of dealing massive sustained damage while remaining durable enough to excel in nearly every game mode.
